failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate matter or crystallization in solvent
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter before BPR and maintain temperature above crystallization point

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction product at high concentration
failure_modes.mitigation: Dilute feed concentration or increase reactor temperature to maintain solubility

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve with particulate-laden solvent to assess blockage risk
Conduct solubility tests at various temperatures to ensure no precipitation in reactor
